## Tagging.activeConsent property

The active consent, selected from the `consent` prop and the `snippetConfig.consent` property. False by default.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
get activeConsent(): boolean;
```

## Remarks

If the consent is undefined in the prop and in the snippetConfig, it will return false.
